response: This code implements a **Bloom filter**, a space-efficient probabilistic data structure that tests whether an element is *possibly* in a set (with false positives but no false negatives). It uses **multiple hash functions** (simulated by appending an index to the item and hashing) to set bits in a bit array (`self.bits`) when adding items (`add`) and checks all corresponding bits for membership (`__contains__`), returning `True` only if all bits are set.
